name: Flowermate V5.0S Pro Mini
summary: A compact conduction vaporiser for dry herb and concentrate with a digital display, for patients who want a versatile, controllable everyday device.
description: The Flowermate V5.0S Pro Mini is a small aluminium-bodied vaporiser that takes both dry herb and concentrate, with a digital display and a wide 40-230C range for proper dose control. A ceramic chamber gives clean, even heating, and it ships with a glass mouthpiece and water-pipe adapter if you want to filter the vapour further. Heat-up is around 30 seconds. For a UK patient who wants a controllable, dual-material device at a fair price, the Pro Mini is capable — the trade-offs are a roughly 75-minute battery and a longer three-hour charge. One year on the device, three months on the battery.

specs.label: Warranty
specs.value: 1 year for the device and 3 months for the batteries
